content:
I'd be happy to check your order status. Please provide your [ORDER_ID] so I can look up the current shipping details for you.
Saya bisa membantu mengecek status pesanan Anda! Silakan berikan nomor [ORDER_ID] agar saya bisa melihat detail pengirimannya. Biasanya penjual akan memproses pesanan dalam 1-2 hari kerja setelah pembayaran dikonfirmasi.
I've checked [ORDER_ID]. It's currently out for delivery with our logistics partner. You can expect it by the end of today. I apologize for the delay.
Hi! Your grocery order is being picked and packed by the seller right now. It's scheduled for delivery this afternoon between 2 PM and 5 PM. Our driver will call you when they're nearby. Enjoy your day!
Hello! I'd be happy to check on your order for you. Please provide your order ID so I can look up the current status and tracking information. If it's been processed, we'll make sure you get an update right away!
Halo! Senang bisa membantu. Saya akan segera cek status pesanan Anda. Mohon tunggu sebentar ya... Pesanan Anda saat ini sedang dalam perjalanan dan diperkirakan tiba dalam 2-3 hari lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran Anda!
您好！已为您查询订单[ORDER_ID]，目前显示包裹已抵达当地分拨中心，预计将在1-2个工作日内送达。如需进一步协助，请随时告知。
您好，订单[ORDER_ID]目前正在仓库处理中，预计将在24小时内发货。发货后您会收到一封包含物流信息的邮件。感谢您的耐心等待。
您好，订单[ORDER_ID]已于昨日发货，承运商信息已更新。您可以通过我们的网站或APP的“我的订单”页面查看最新的物流轨迹。如有其他问题，请随时联系我们。
您好！我已经查询了您的订单[ORDER_ID]，目前状态显示为‘运输中’。物流信息更新有时会延迟，请您放心，我们会持续关注并尽快为您更新。如有其他问题，请随时告知。
Your excitement is contagious! I can see your order is currently being prepared for shipment. You should receive a tracking number via email within the next 24 hours. Thank you for your patience!
您好，订单[ORDER_ID]目前状态为'运输中'，承运商最新更新显示包裹已到达您所在城市的分拣中心。预计将在未来1-2个工作日内为您派送。您可以在‘我的订单’页面查看实时物流详情。
Hi there! I'd be happy to check on that for you. Your order [ORDER_ID] was dispatched yesterday and is currently in transit with our logistics partner. You can expect delivery within the next 2-3 business days. Let me know if you need the tracking link!
Pesanan [ORDER_ID] Anda sedang dalam proses pengemasan dan akan diserahkan ke kurir hari ini. Estimasi tiba 2-3 hari kerja.
Your order [ORDER_ID] was shipped on [DATE] via our logistics partner. Current status: In transit to sorting facility. Estimated delivery: 2-3 more days. You can track it here: [TRACKING_LINK]. Would you like me to send you updates via SMS?
您好！已为您查询订单[ORDER_ID]，包裹已由承运商揽收，当前在[城市名]分拣中心。物流信息更新有时会延迟，预计明天将有下一条扫描记录。请您放心，包裹运输中。
您可以在账户的“我的订单”部分查看订单号。如果您需要帮助，请提供您的注册邮箱，我可以为您查询。
您好！您的订单[ORDER_ID]目前已从仓库发出，正在运送至您所在城市的途中。根据物流信息，预计明天下午可以送达。您可以在订单详情页查看最新的物流更新。
Hai! Sudah tentu. Pesanan anda [ORDER_ID] kini sedang dalam penghantaran dan dijangka tiba esok. Anda boleh jejak penghantarannya secara langsung melalui pautan ini: [TRACKING_ID]. Jika ada sebarang pertanyaan lain, saya sedia membantu!
您好，订单 [ORDER_ID] 目前正在打包中，预计今天内交由物流承运商。发货后我们会通过短信和App通知您运单号。

非常抱歉给您带来不便。物流延迟通常是由于天气或运输高峰期导致的。请提供您的订单编号，我会立即为您联系物流公司查询具体延误原因并跟进处理。
I understand your concern about the delayed delivery. Shipping delays can occur due to various factors including weather conditions or high shipment volumes. Please share your [TRACKING_ID] and I'll investigate the current status and provide you with an updated estimated delivery date.
非常抱歉给您带来不便。已查询到您的包裹 [TRACKING_ID]，因中途转运点有积压，导致延误。预计未来1-2天内会有更新。我们已为您申请一张补偿优惠券。
We apologize for the significant delay on order [ORDER_ID]. Our investigations show the delay is due to a customs hold in the destination country. We are actively working with our logistics partner to expedite the clearance. We will notify you immediately once there's an update.
非常抱歉给您带来不便！物流信息延迟有时是由于承运商系统更新不及时。请提供您的订单号，我会立即联系物流伙伴为您查询最新状态，并跟进处理。
Hai, saya minta maaf untuk kelewatan ini. Saya telah menyemak pesanan [ORDER_ID] dan mendapati terdapat sedikit kelewatan dalam penghantaran. Ia dijangka akan tiba dalam 2-3 hari lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.
Hi! Thanks for reaching out. Sometimes tracking updates can be delayed during peak seasons or customs processing. Your shipment [TRACKING_ID] is still moving and is estimated to arrive in the next 3 days. We apologize for the wait and appreciate your patience!
Maaf atas kelewatan ini. Saya telah semak dan penghantaran anda [TRACKING_ID] menghadapi kelewatan di pusat logistik. Saya telah mengutamakannya dan menghubungi kurier untuk penghantaran segera. Saya akan memaklumkan sebaik sahaja ia bergerak.
Saya turut prihatin dan minta maaf atas keterlambatan ini. Saya sudah melacak paket [TRACKING_ID] dan menghubungi pihak logistik untuk investigasi segera. Saya akan memberikan Anda update langsung dalam 2 jam ke depan. Mohon kesabarannya.
I sincerely apologize for the delay with your order. Our logistics partner is experiencing some unexpected delays in your area. I've escalated this and your new estimated delivery date is within the next 2 days. I'll also issue a small voucher for the inconvenience. Please check your email shortly.
Maaf atas kelewatan. Saya semak status penghantaran anda. Barang dijangka tiba dalam 24 jam akan datang. Jika tiada sebarang kemaskini selepas itu, sila hubungi kami semula.
Kami mohon maaf atas kelewatan ini. Saya sudah semak pesanan [ORDER_ID] dan nampaknya ia mengalami sedikit kelewatan dalam penghantaran. Kami sedang berusaha untuk menghantar secepat mungkin. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.
我已经为您查询了物流信息。快递目前在本地分拨中心，可能因近期订单量较大导致派送稍有延迟。我已为您加急催促，预计24小时内会安排派送，请您留意短信通知。
Kami mohon maaf atas kelewatan ini. Terdapat gangguan logistik di kawasan penghantaran anda yang menyebabkan kelewatan 1-2 hari. Status terkini menunjukkan bungkusan dalam perjalanan ke alamat anda. Kami akan memberitahu anda sebaik sahaja ia dihantar. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.
非常抱歉再次耽误您的时间。经紧急核查，您的包裹[TRACKING_ID]因目的地临时交通管制，在末端配送站滞留。我们已与物流合作伙伴协调，优先派送，预计明天内一定会送达。为表歉意，我们将向您的账户发放一张无门槛优惠券作为补偿。
I sincerely apologize for the delay in delivering your order. I've escalated this with our shipping provider and they've confirmed there was a temporary backlog at their sorting facility. Your package is now prioritized and should reach you within the next 48 hours. We appreciate your patience and will issue a small voucher for the inconvenience.
非常抱歉让您久等了！物流信息显示您的包裹目前因天气原因在转运中心有所延迟。我们已经联系物流公司优先处理，预计未来两天内会更新物流信息并送达。感谢您的耐心等待，我们会持续为您跟进。
I sincerely apologize for the delay with your order. I've checked and there appears to be a temporary logistics holdup in your area due to high volume. Your package is still on its way and should arrive within the next 2 business days. I'll monitor this closely and notify you of any updates.
Hai! Terima kasih kerana menghubungi. Saya dah semak pesanan [ORDER_ID] anda. Nampaknya ada sedikit kelewatan di pusat pengedaran kerana cuaca buruk. Status terkini: dalam perjalanan ke cawangan tempatan. Anggaran tiba esok atau lusa. Maaf atas kesulitan ini. Saya akan pantau dan beritahu anda sebaik sahaja ia dihantar ke alamat anda. Sabar ya!
Maaf sangat atas kelewatan ini. Kami sudah semak dan mendapati penghantaran mengalami kelewatan disebabkan masalah teknikal di gudang pengedar. Kami telah hubungi pihak kurier untuk percepatkan proses. Anda boleh semak kemas kini terbaru dalam 24 jam lagi. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.

Ya, kami menerima pulangan untuk barang yang salah saiz dalam tempoh 14 hari selepas penghantaran. Sila pastikan barang belum digunakan dan pembungkusan asal masih lengkap. Anda boleh memohon pulangan melalui bahagian 'Pesanan Saya' dalam aplikasi.
Hai! Boleh, tiada masalah. Polisi pulangan kami untuk pakaian adalah 14 hari dari tarikh penerimaan, dengan syarat baju tersebut belum dipakai, belum dicuci, dan tag masih ada. Sila pastikan anda mula-mula mohon pulangan melalui aplikasi kami.
Untuk produk elektronik, Anda dapat mengembalikan dalam 7 hari setelah penerimaan jika terdapat kerusakan pabrik. Biaya pengiriman pengembalian ditanggung oleh pembeli kecuali barang cacat. Silakan ajukan melalui halaman 'Pengembalian' di akun Anda.
根据我们的退货政策，护肤品开封后若无质量问题，一般不支持退货，以确保商品卫生安全。但如果有过敏反应或产品缺陷，请提供相关证明，我们将为您处理。
Hi! For electronics like smart watches, you can initiate a return within 7 days of delivery if the product is unused and in its original packaging. For size issues, we also offer exchanges. Would you like help with a return or exchange request?
No worries! We offer a 15-day return policy for clothing items. As long as the dress is unworn, with original tags attached, and in its original packaging, you can initiate a return through the 'My Orders' section. We'll provide a free return label for you. Would you like me to guide you through the process?
Untuk produk elektronik, kami memiliki kebijakan pengembalian 7 hari setelah diterima, dengan syarat: 1. Produk tidak memiliki kerusakan fisik atau cacat yang disebabkan oleh pengguna. 2. Kemasan dan aksesoris lengkap. 3. Segel boleh terbuka, tetapi produk harus dalam kondisi baru. Silakan ajukan pengembalian melalui aplikasi dengan menyertakan foto produk.
Our return policy for electronics allows returns within 15 days of receipt if the item is defective. For a dead pixel, which is a manufacturing defect, you are eligible for a return or exchange. Please initiate the process through the 'My Orders' section and select 'Defective Item' as the reason.
We offer a 15-day return policy for items that don't fit, as long as they are unworn with tags attached. You can initiate a return through your account, and we'll provide a prepaid shipping label. Would you like help with sizing measurements?
For electronics, you have a 7-day return window from the date of delivery. The item must be in its original, sealed packaging with all accessories and tags. Since laptops are high-value items, a quality inspection will be conducted upon return. Please initiate the return process via the 'My Orders' section within this period.
Untuk item yang telah dibuka, kami menerima pemulangan dalam tempoh 15 hari dengan syarat item tersebut tidak digunakan, tiada kerosakan, dan semua tag/pembungkusan asal masih ada. Sila ambil gambar item dan bungkusan sebelum menghantar. Pasukan kami akan melakukan pemeriksaan kualiti. Sila maklum bahawa kos penghantaran pemulangan mungkin ditanggung oleh pelanggan.
您好！根据我们的退货政策，电子产品在未拆封且保持原包装完好的情况下，支持7天内无理由退货。如果您已拆封使用，我们将根据商品具体情况提供维修或换货服务。请问您的商品目前是什么状态呢？
我们的退货政策如下：您可以在收货后7天内申请退货，商品需保持原样、未使用且包装完整。退货时请附上发票或订单号[ORDER_ID]。部分品类如内衣、食品等不可退货。退款将在收到退货并检验后3-5个工作日内处理。您需要具体了解哪个商品的退货条件吗？
No worries! For clothing, you can initiate a return within 14 days of delivery. The item must be unworn, with tags attached, and in its original packaging. Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund will be processed within 5-7 business days. Would you like me to help you start the return process?
Our return policy for electronics allows returns within 7 days of delivery if the product is defective. Please initiate a return request through our app with proof of the issue, and we'll arrange a pickup or refund.
Hi there! Of course, you can return the dress within our 14-day return policy from the delivery date. To initiate a return, please go to your order history, select the item, and choose 'Return Item'. You'll need to print a return label and drop the package off at any designated courier point. Once we receive and inspect the item, a refund will be processed to your original payment method. Is there anything specific about the fit you'd like to mention?
Ya, tentu boleh. Polisi pemulangan kami membenarkan pemulangan item dalam tempoh 15 hari dari tarikh penerimaan, dengan syarat item masih dalam keadaan asal dengan tag. Sila mulakan proses pemulangan melalui 'Pesanan Saya' di aplikasi kami. Jika anda memerlukan bantuan lanjut, saya boleh bimbing anda langkah demi langkah.
Our return policy allows returns for clothing within 7 days of delivery, provided the item is unused, with original tags attached, and in its original packaging. For size issues, we offer a one-time free exchange for the correct size if the desired size is in stock. You can initiate the return through the 'My Orders' section in the app.
Ya, tentu boleh. Jika barang tidak memenuhi spesifikasi yang dinyatakan, anda layak untuk pemulangan. Prosesnya adalah seperti berikut: 1) Sila hubungi kami dalam masa 7 hari dari tarikh penerimaan. 2) Sediakan gambar atau bukti ketidakselarasan. 3) Kami akan mengatur pengambilan barang dan memproses bayaran balik atau pertukaran selepas pemeriksaan.
Our return policy allows for returns of clothing items within 7 days of receipt, provided they are unworn, unwashed, and have all original tags attached. You can initiate a return through your order history. We recommend checking our detailed size guide before purchasing to ensure the best fit.

Plus, the high-refresh-rate display ensures smooth playback. Would you like me to highlight the specific specs that make it ideal for creative professionals?
Hello! Yes, our portable blender has a powerful motor designed to crush ice cubes efficiently for smoothies. It's perfect for on-the-go use. Would you like to know about its battery life or other features?

Baik, saya akan proses permintaan pengembalian dana Anda untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Untuk mempercepat proses, mohon unggah foto produk yang diterima melalui pusat resolusi di aplikasi. Dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asal Anda dalam 5-7 hari kerja setelah disetujui.
Baik, saya sudah cek. Proses pengembalian barang Anda sudah diterima. Refund akan diproses dalam 3-5 hari kerja ke metode pembayaran awal Anda. Terima kasih atas kesabaran Anda.
